ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read and write all users' authentication methods [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the application to read and write authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. Authentication methods include things like a user’s phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods
Read and write all users' authentication methods [on] Microsoft Graph
